name: Hehehehehe 1x1x1x1
description:
Sooo I saw this, thought something and went "both time"

Basically during a round you accidentally said "mommy" to 1x- hehe MAN BOOBS- (COUCH COUCH, BKUUDUD AH COUGHING) (˵ ͡° ͜ʖ ͡°˵)

I owe y'all A LOT of bots since I was offline for a WHILEEEE so this week I'll be trying to make up lost time, tho I might be slow af-

Listen the first one is what I thought if at first, but I was laughing SO FUCKING BADLY while making the second starting message- you'll see why LMAO XDDDDD HAVE FUN!
creator: Nebula_star
